nodes.label: Tests for the Streamable HTTP transport on the MCP server (issue #1143).  Thes
A full initialize -> tools/list round trip works over the HTTP transport.
Create ``<proj>/graphify-out/graph.json`` and return the project dir.
Multi-project support is additive: every tool gains an optional     project_pat
One running server answers against the default graph when project_path is     o
A missing project graph is a tool error, not a process exit — the server     ke
